title: Liparis treubii
taxonomy: Liparis treubii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. Liparis treubii is a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. This species is further classified under the tribe Malaxideae. Liparis treubii is native to Indonesia and is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species within the Orchidaceae family.

The health benefits of Liparis treubii include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various ailments, including fever and respiratory infections.
